label: Debug
notes: High-confidence debug-family baseline with structural WRLD/CELL reads enabled.

label: ReleaseBetaBase
notes: Updated Phase 1B.25 after snippet re-extraction. Drift-correction-centered MinidumpAnalyzer (1B.22) + ExerciseAllCodePaths now captures the pCellMap byte ranges, so the probe sees 16 maps (was 0) and lifts confidence from low to high. Winning worldShift moved from -16 (random low-confidence guess with no real evidence) to 0 (PDB-aligned, supported by 16 map signals).

label: ReleaseBetaXex4
notes: Early release-beta variant with the same high-confidence cell shift as Debug/MemDebug.

label: ReleaseBetaXex44
notes: Late release-beta variant lands on a distinct zero-shift CELL layout; the high absolute winner score allows map walking despite the low probe margin.

label: MemDebug
notes: High-confidence MemDebug baseline aligned with the Debug-era CELL shift.
